title: PressRelease
description: A Bronx District Attorney press release or newsroom item — indictments, sentencings, initiatives, and statements. Reverse-engineered from the office's /html/newsroom/press-releases-YYYY.shtml pages (2016-2025). There is no RSS feed, JSON, or API today; each release is a hand-published HTML entry.

id.description: Stable identifier or slug for the release (net-new; no canonical id exists today).

summary.description: Short teaser / dek shown on the newsroom index.

year.description: Archive year (the site groups releases into per-year pages 2016-2025).

relatedCase.description: Free-text reference to an associated case or operation name (e.g. 'Operation Pit Crew'). No structured CaseRecord is ever published.

url.description: Canonical page URL for the release, if any.
